'''hadowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qindarkas|qindarkas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qindarkas|qindarkas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hadowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædeweth|hædeweth]] || [[word:hædewej|hædewej]] || [[word:hædewesh|hædewesh]] || [[word:hædewe|hædewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadodowoth|hadodowoth]] || [[word:hadodowoj|hadodowoj]] || [[word:hadodowosh|hadodowosh]] || [[word:hadodowo|hadodowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadowoth|hadowoth]] || [[word:hadowoj|hadowoj]] || [[word:hadowosh|hadowosh]] || [[word:hadowo|hadowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadofwoth|hadofwoth]] || [[word:hadofwoj|hadofwoj]] || [[word:hadofwosh|hadofwosh]] || [[word:hadofwof|hadofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadowotho|hadowotho]] || [[word:hadowojo|hadowojo]] || [[word:hadowosho|hadowosho]] || [[word:hadowoko|hadowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadowoth|hadowoth]] || [[word:hadowoj|hadowoj]] || [[word:hadowosh|hadowosh]] || [[word:hadowo|hadowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadowothol|hadowothol]] || [[word:hadowojol|hadowojol]] || [[word:hadowoshol|hadowoshol]] || [[word:hadowokol|hadowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadowothotho|hadowothotho]] || [[word:hadowojojo|hadowojojo]] || [[word:hadowoshosho|hadowoshosho]] || [[word:hadowoko|hadowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadowothon|hadowothon]] || [[word:hadowojon|hadowojon]] || [[word:hadowoshon|hadowoshon]] || [[word:hadowokon|hadowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadowothoro|hadowothoro]] || [[word:hadowojoro|hadowojoro]] || [[word:hadowoshoro|hadowoshoro]] || [[word:hadowokoro|hadowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
